name: Beans with Plum Sauce (Lobio Tkemali)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dried kidney beans or red beans
fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight, rinse and drain.
2. Cook the beans with one whole clove of garlic (halved), 1/4 tsp red pepper flakes, 1 bay leaf, and 2 tablespoons red wine vinegar until tender, about 1 hour.
3. Drain the beans.
4. While the beans are warm, stir in salt, remaining vinegar, minced garlic, plum jam, cilantro, and black pepper to taste.
5. Serve at room temperature.
